title: zyrphelis ciliaris subsp. ciliaris
intro: Zyrphelis ciliaris subsp. ciliaris, also known as Mountain Heath, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zyrphelis ciliaris subsp. ciliaris include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible antiviral and antibacterial effects. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
